name: Roofr Roofing Estimating API
what_it_does: Roofr roofing-specific measurement and estimating REST API for aerial roof measurement, instant quotes, and roofing contractor CRM. Enables AI agents to manage aerial roof measurement orders and report delivery for estimating automation, handle instant quote generation from roof measurements for sales automation, access material calculation and waste factor management for roofing procurement, retrieve project pipeline and lead management for roofing sales CRM, manage proposal creation and digital contract execution for roofing sales workflow, handle material ordering and supplier integration for roofing procurement automation, access photo documentation and condition reporting for insurance claim support, retrieve job scheduling and crew management for roofing operations, manage payment collection and financing integration for roofing transaction management, and integrate Roofr with roofing CRM, insurance claim platforms, and material suppliers.
use_cases: Ordering roof measurements from roofing estimating agents
Generating instant quotes from aerial data agents
Processing insurance claim support from restoration agents
Managing roofing leads from sales pipeline agents
not_for: Non-roofing trades without aerial measurement need
Commercial flat roofing without residential slope focus
best_when: A residential roofing contractor, storm restoration company, or roofing material supplier wanting AI agents to automate aerial roof measurement ordering, instant quoting, proposal generation, and insurance claim documentation.
avoid_when: ROOF MEASUREMENT ACCURACY FOR MATERIAL ORDERING: Automated material orders based on aerial roof measurements must include adequate waste factor; aerial measurement accuracy varies by roof complexity and imagery resolution; automated orders for complex roofs without verification create material shortage risk. Insurance claim documentation accuracy — automated photo documentation and scope generation for insurance claims must accurately represent storm damage; automated claim support with inaccurate scope creates insurance claim dispute and potential fraud exposure. Contractor license verification — automated roofing proposals must verify contractor license status in each work jurisdiction; automated proposal generation in unlicensed states creates contractor license law violation. Financing integration — automated roofing financing offers must comply with TILA/Reg Z disclosure requirements and state consumer lending laws; automated financing without required disclosures creates consumer protection liability.

auth.notes: Roofr uses API key and OAuth 2.0. REST API with JSON. Toronto, Ontario / San Francisco HQ. Founded 2018. Private (Base10 Partners, Gradient Ventures/Google). Roofing-specific CRM, measurement, and estimating. 10,000+ roofing contractor customers. Aerial measurement from satellite and drone imagery. Competes with EagleView, Hover, and AccuLynx for roofing contractor software.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free plan with limited reports; pay-per-report for measurements plus CRM subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-measurement report plus monthly CRM subscription
pricing.notes: Toronto/San Francisco. Base10/Gradient Ventures-backed. Founded 2018. 10,000+ roofing contractors. Measurement-first model. Competes with EagleView and Hover.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; measurement report generation is async (minutes to hours)

known_agent_gotchas: ASYNC MEASUREMENT REPORT DELIVERY: Aerial roof measurement reports take minutes to hours to generate; automated workflows must poll measurement status or use webhooks — do not assume synchronous delivery

Material waste factor automation — automated material calculation from roof measurements must apply appropriate waste factor by shingle type and roof complexity; automated orders with minimum waste factor create material shortage on complex roofs

Insurance scope accuracy — automated storm damage scope from aerial imagery has accuracy limitations for ground-level damage; automated insurance claim scope must note aerial measurement limitations and recommend field verification
Contractor license compliance — automated proposal generation in new markets must verify contractor license status; roofing contractor licensing requirements vary significantly by state and county

Storm lead campaign compliance — automated outreach to storm-affected homeowners must comply with state consumer protection laws and door-to-door solicitation regulations; some states prohibit contractor solicitation within days of storm event

Imagery coverage gaps — aerial measurement is unavailable for properties without recent high-resolution imagery coverage; automated measurement ordering for rural or recently-developed properties may fail; implement fallback to manual measurement
agent_readiness.security_notes: Roofing software. SOC2. API key/OAuth2. US/CA. Roof measurement and contractor data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Roofing estimating. SOC2. API key/OAuth2. US/CA. Aerial measurement and roofing data.
